heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 20306 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out sections 20303, 20304, and 20305 of this title, $40,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2022 through 2028.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 20306, , formerly § 214, , ; renumbered § 214B and amended , (e), , , 5034; , , ; , , ; , , ; , , , which authorized appropriations for sections 20303, 20304, and 20305 of this title for fiscal years 2019 through 2023, was repealed by , , .Pub.
